name: university-erp
description: University ERP Enterprise Monorepo - Spring Boot 3 & React Vite TypeScript

scripts.dev:backend: node -e "const { spawn } = require('child_process'); const cmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'mvnw.cmd' : './mvnw'; spawn(cmd, ['spring-boot:run'], { cwd: './backend', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true });"
scripts.build:backend: node -e "const { spawn } = require('child_process'); const cmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'mvnw.cmd' : './mvnw'; spawn(cmd, ['clean', 'package', '-DskipTests'], { cwd: './backend', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true });"
